question: What is the tallest mountain in the world and in which range is it located?

passages.title: Mount Everest
passages.text: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level, located in the Mahalangur Himal sub-range of the Himalayas. Its peak is 8,848.86 metres above sea level.

passages.title: Himalayas
passages.text: The Himalayas are a mountain range in Asia separating the plains of the Indian subcontinent from the Tibetan Plateau. The range has many of Earth's highest peaks.

passages.title: Banana
passages.text: A banana is an elongated edible fruit produced by several kinds of large herbaceous flowering plants in the genus Musa.

passages.title: Pacific Ocean
passages.text: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's five oceanic divisions.

passages.title: Python (programming language)
passages.text: Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language widely used in data science and machine learning.

question: Which programming language created by Guido van Rossum is popular for machine learning?

passages.title: Python (programming language)
passages.text: Python is a high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991. It is widely used in machine learning and data science.

passages.title: Guido van Rossum
passages.text: Guido van Rossum is a Dutch programmer best known as the creator of the Python programming language.

passages.text: Coffee is a beverage prepared from roasted coffee beans, popular worldwide for its stimulating effect.

passages.text: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level, located in the Himalayas.

passages.text: Java is a class-based, object-oriented programming language designed to have few implementation dependencies.

question: What fruit is rich in potassium and is the product of plants in the genus Musa?

passages.title: Banana
passages.text: A banana is an elongated edible fruit produced by plants in the genus Musa. Bananas are rich in potassium and dietary fiber.

passages.title: Musa (genus)
passages.text: Musa is a genus of flowering plants whose members produce bananas and plantains.

question: Which ocean is the largest and deepest on Earth?

passages.title: Pacific Ocean
passages.text: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's five oceanic divisions, extending from the Arctic in the north to the Southern Ocean.

passages.title: Ocean
passages.text: An ocean is a body of salt water that composes much of a planet's hydrosphere. Earth has five oceans, the largest being the Pacific.

question: Who created Java and what kind of language is it?

passages.title: Java (programming language)
passages.text: Java is a class-based, object-oriented programming language originally developed by James Gosling at Sun Microsystems.

passages.title: James Gosling
passages.text: James Gosling is a Canadian computer scientist known as the founder and lead designer of the Java programming language.
